hero.name: Antonio Fortunato
hero.bio_html: A Master's graduate in Economics with hands-on experience in econometric modelling, ARIMA forecasting and data visualisation. I blend analytical rigour with quantitative expertise to turn raw data into actionable insight.
hero.typewriter: Data Analysis · Business Intelligence · Digital Transformation
hero.bio: Master's graduate in Economics and Business, passionate about leveraging data and technology for smarter decisions.
hero.bio_extended: A Master's graduate in Economics with experience in econometric modelling, ARIMA forecasting and data visualisation. I blend analytical rigour with quantitative expertise to turn raw data into actionable insight.
hero.feat1_desc: ARIMA models, regressions, forecasting and machine learning.
hero.feat2_desc: Interactive dashboards, actionable insights and decision support.
hero.feat3_desc: Turning data into tangible value for businesses and professionals.
hero.mobile_tagline: Economics, data and technology driving smarter decisions.

about.title: About
about.p1: Economics, finance and innovation form the backbone of my academic and professional journey. Holding a Master's degree in Economics and Business with first-class honours (110/110), I have built a solid foundation in business analysis, quantitative methods and data-driven decision-making.
about.p2: During my internship at Diskover Srl, I worked on projects centred around data analysis and the adoption of digital tools to streamline processes and support strategic decisions.
about.p3: Strong interpersonal skills, a client-first mindset and a natural aptitude for problem-solving round out my profile — qualities I see as essential for turning data into real-world value.

items.description: Studied and presented the Flask framework. Designed and developed SYRIAS — a web application for time-series forecasting built on ARIMA models.
Handled administrative tasks, communications and digital marketing campaigns for the local tourism board.
